# Thread Handoff Template

Use this when ending a thread or starting a new one.

## Thread Type

```text
Experiment / Code / Method / Data
```

## What Changed

```text
- ...
```

## Evidence

```text
- Files changed:
- Commands run:
- Results:
```

## Current Decision

```text
- ...
```

## Next Action

```text
- ...
```

## Files To Read Next

```text
PROJECT_DASHBOARD.md
docs/status/PROJECT_STATUS.md
docs/status/DECISION_LOG.md
docs/status/EXPERIMENT_LOG.md
docs/threads/<thread-file>.md
```
